title: Clearlite
description: Clearlite helps keep your server running smoothly by removing only unnecessary entities — without wiping out valuable ones like pets, armor stands, or storage minecarts.
body:
Clearlite

A lightweight ClearLag alternative designed for performance and flexibility.

Clearlite helps keep your server running smoothly by removing only unnecessary entities — without wiping out valuable ones like pets, armor stands, or storage minecarts. Unlike heavier entity cleaners, Clearlite focuses on efficiency and server health while giving you full control.

#####  Note: Clearlite will always remain lightweight. Features are added only when they improve stability, compatibility, or are requested by the community without bloating the plugin. Our focus is performance, safety, and simplicity.
# ✨ Features

⚡ Lightweight & optimized – built for performance, avoiding lag spikes.

🧹 Smart entity removal – clears expendable entities (dropped items, stray projectiles, etc.) while excluding boats, minecarts, XP orbs, pets, item frames, and armor stands.

⚙️ Configurable YAML support – customize what gets cleared and when.

📢 Optional broadcasts – notify players when a cleanup happens (or keep it silent).

🗺️ Region-safe compatibility (optional) – supports plugins like WorldGuard or Towny for protected areas.

![slabbo emote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4106f388492fe60577e7872ea4d00c54dfec160e_0.webp)Slabbo compatibility (optional) - Supports Slabbo plugin (WIP)

🔨 Commands – simple /clearlite command for manual cleanups.

# 📌 Why Clearlite?

Traditional ClearLag plugins often remove too much, frustrating players and damaging gameplay. Clearlite is designed to be gentle but effective, giving server owners peace of mind while keeping worlds clean and lag-free.
